summary: Completed frontend testing of Progress.jsx and CourseDetail.jsx pages. All 11 features tested successfully. Both pages implement the production-tier design system with glassmorphism, Fraunces/Manrope typography, card-organic patterns, and stagger animations.
passed_tests: Progress page loads correctly for admin user with My Progress tab active by default (lesson-tab-active class verified)
Progress page shows bento stat grid with correct data: Day Streak (0), Lessons Done (0), Courses (1)
Progress page shows SVG overall progress ring with 0% and 'Across 1 course' text
Progress page course progress list shows enrolled course 'Introduction to the Gospel' with 0/2 progress bar
Progress page Students tab shows '0 STUDENTS' header with empty state card and invite code prompt
CourseDetail page shows hero banner with thumbnail image and meta badges ('3 lessons', 'Scheduled')
CourseDetail page shows lesson list with numbered circles (1, 2, 3) and chevron navigation icons
CourseDetail page admin actions (Settings gear, Delete trash icons) visible for teacher/admin
CourseDetail page 'Add Lesson' button visible for teacher/admin
Navigation between Courses and CourseDetail works (back button '← Courses' navigates to /courses)
Mobile responsiveness verified - both pages render correctly on 390x844 viewport with no horizontal overflow
critical_code_review_comments: Progress.jsx correctly implements bento stat grid with row-span-2 for streak card
SVG progress ring uses strokeDasharray calculation for animated progress display
CourseDetail.jsx hero banner uses aspect-[2.8/1] for thumbnail, aspect-[3/1] for placeholder
Lesson cards use numbered circles with primary/10 background, checkmark for completed lessons
Both pages use Fraunces serif for headings (inline style) and Manrope for body text
Tab system uses lesson-tab/lesson-tab-active/lesson-tab-inactive classes with underline indicator
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Stagger animations applied via stagger-children class on card containers
seed_data_creation: None - used existing course 'Introduction to the Gospel' (ID: 0154063e-05f7-4aff-96e8-392861aa0ecc)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Progress and CourseDetail pages fully tested. Key features: 1) Progress page has bento stat grid (streak tall card, lessons done, courses), SVG progress ring, course progress cards with progress bars, Students tab with empty state. 2) CourseDetail page has hero banner with meta badges, lesson list with numbered circles, admin actions (settings/delete icons), Add Lesson button. Both pages use Fraunces/Manrope typography, card-organic styling, and are mobile responsive.

tabs.my_progress: Active by default with lesson-tab-active class and underline indicator

bento_stat_grid.streak_card: row-span-2, tall card with Flame icon, amber background

course_progress_list.cards: card-organic with BookOpen/Award icon, progress bar, completion badge

students_tab.student_cards: Avatar with initials, name, email, badges for courses/lessons

hero_banner.with_thumbnail: aspect-[2.8/1], gradient overlay, meta badges at bottom-left
hero_banner.without_thumbnail: aspect-[3/1], primary/10 gradient, BookOpen placeholder icon
hero_banner.meta_badges: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm, lesson count and unlock type

admin_actions.edit_button: Settings icon, w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-muted

lesson_cards.numbered_circle: w-10 h-10 rounded-full, primary/10 or green for completed
lesson_cards.title: Manrope font-semibold text-sm

lessons_section.locked_lessons: Lock icon, opacity-50, 'Complete previous to unlock'

mobile_responsiveness.progress_page: Bento grid adapts to 2-column layout, all elements visible
mobile_responsiveness.course_detail_page: Hero banner scales, lesson cards stack vertically
mobile_responsiveness.bottom_nav: Floating pill design visible on both pages
